texto: Money never stays with me. It would burn me if it did. I throw it out of my hands as soon as possible, lest it should find its way into my heart.
explicacao: Orientação direta de John Wesley sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Money never stays with me. It would burn me if it did. I throw it out of my hands as soon as poss…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, heart, me, útil em momentos de me e hands.

texto: Holy solitaries' is a phrase no more consistent with the Gospel than holy adulterers. The Gospel of Christ knows no religion but social; no holiness, but social holiness.
explicacao: Citação de John Wesley sobre temas ligados a fe. “Holy solitaries' is a phrase no more consistent with the Gospel than holy adulterers. The Gospel …” articula fe, holiness, religion em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como religion.

texto: Do you not know that God entrusted you with that money (all above what buys necessities for your families) to feed the hungry, to clothe the naked, to help the stranger, the widow, the fatherless; and, indeed, as far as it will go, to relieve the wants of all mankind? How can you, how dare you, defraud the Lord, by applying it to any other purpose?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de John Wesley que provoca temas ligados a fe. Ao questionar “Do you not know that God entrusted you with that money (all above what buys necessities for your …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, caring, christianity, com foco em christianity e clothing.

How can you, how dare you, defraud the Lord, by applying it to any other purpose?

texto: Bear up the hands that hang down by faith and prayer support the tottering knees. Storm the throne of grace and persevere therein and mercy will come down.
explicacao: Citação de John Wesley sobre temas ligados a fe. “Bear up the hands that hang down by faith and prayer support the tottering knees. Storm the thron…” articula fe, prayer, reflexao em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e reflexao.
